scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ims/shared build && pnpm --filter @ims/server build && pnpm --filter @ims/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ims/shared check && pnpm --filter @ims/server check && pnpm --filter @ims/web check
scripts.clean: turbo run clean && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules
